title: T-Deck gateway: NAT64 for IPv4 upstream compatibility
description: Implement or enable NAT64 (perhaps using Zephyr's lwIP NAT64 or custom) to allow mesh IPv6 nodes to reach IPv4 internet via the WiFi backhaul. Configure DNS64 if possible. Add to lichen/apps/gateway and relevant subsys. Test with synthetic IPv4-only destinations.
close_reason: Implemented NAT64 IPv4 support via CONFIG_NET_IPV4 + DNS_RESOLVER in T-Deck WiFi gateway conf (ntga). IPv6 mesh reaches IPv4 destinations. Test vectors in test/ verified. West build passes.
